headline: 5 Consumer Discretionary Stocks to Buy Despite the Sector's Bloodbath
summary: RL, HAS, FOXA, HTHT and WMG are five consumer discretionary stocks that stand out despite the sector facing pressure from rate uncertainty and geopolitical risks.

headline: Tonies (DB:TNIE) Stock Could Be 17.7% Undervalued After Hasbro Partnership
summary: Tonies (DB:TNIE) stock is in focus after the company and Hasbro announced audio-first versions of MONOPOLY, GUESS WHO?, and THE GAME OF LIFE for Toniebox 2, tied to a phased global rollout. See our latest analysis for tonies. The Hasbro partnership comes at a time when momentum in tonies stock is already building, with a 7 day share price return of 13.93% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 93.83% summarising a strong recent and longer term run. If you are curious about other growth...
